title: Gap Fingerprint
description: Identity schema for failed experiment archival and retrieval. Used by research-cycle plan phase to find prior attempts at the same gap.

repo.description: Project repository name (genomics, intel, selve, meta, skills)

subsystem.description: Affected subsystem (variant-classification, pharmacogenomics, calibration, hooks, etc.)

mechanism_tags.description: Free-form tags for the approach tried (e.g. spliceai, threshold-change, new-script)

gap_id.description: Original gap identifier from CYCLE.md (e.g. G15, G17)

base_commit.description: SHA of the commit before the failed change

failing_metric.description: Which metric or test failed (e.g. 'AUPRC dropped 0.97→0.91', 'ast.parse SyntaxError')

plan_summary.description: One-line summary of what was attempted

failure_reason.description: Why it failed — for negative transfer to future plan phases

patch_file.description: Relative path to the saved .patch file
